title: Student finance application forms and notes for new 2025 to 2026 full-time students
body: "If you’re a new student applying for a Tuition Fee Loan and a Maintenance Loan in academic year 2025 to 2026, you’ll need to complete and send a PN1 form if you cannot apply through your online account.  There is guidance available to help you apply and a form to help provide proof of your identity. "
